---
layout: cv
title: Aaron Soderquist's CV
---
# Aaron Soderquist
Biologist, Writer, Publisher.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="ajsoderquist@gmail.com">ajsoderquist@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="http://southernbranchpub.com">Publisher Site</a>
</div>


## Currently

on Final semester of College

### Specialized in

Biotechnology, Crop Science.


### Research interests

Cooling, power series, optics, alchemy, planetary motions, apples.


## Education

`2020-2026`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg.__







## Occupation

`2025-2026`
__Wendy's__, Rexburg

- Breakfast Crew Member





<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: April 2026 -->
